languages.text: "Погонщица — тварь древняя. Может быть, даже не одна. Время от времени выползет, проклятущая, и начинает воплями на мозги давить. Черт ее знает, зачем ей это, но вот что точно, так это что она потихоньку у всех разум отшибает. Кто-то паникует, кто-то злится... по разному у каждого. У Дунавски есть защитные наушники, но они единственные, так что не спасение".

"The Drover is an ancient creature. Maybe there's more than one. Every once in a while, the damn thing comes out and starts shrieking, making us deranged. Who knows why it does it, but what we do know is that it's slowly driving everyone mad. Some people panic, some people get angry... it's different for everyone. Dunawski has ear protection, but they're the only pair, so they're no salvation."

У Дунавски есть защитные наушники, но они единственные, так что не спасение".

languages.text: 「ドローバーは古くからある生き物だ。もしかしたら複数いるかもしれない。時々、その accursed creature が現れて叫び始め、我々を狂わせる。なぜそうするのかはわからないが、確実に言えるのは、それがゆっくりと我々を狂わせていることだ。人によってはパニックになる、怒り狂う者もいる…人それぞれだ。ダナウスキーは耳栓を持っているが、それは唯一の耳栓なので、救いにはならない」
languages.original_text: "The Drover is an ancient creature. Maybe there's more than one. Every once in a while, the damn thing comes out and starts shrieking, making us deranged. Who knows why it does it, but what we do know is that it's slowly driving everyone mad. Some people panic, some people get angry... it's different for everyone. Dunawski has ear protection, but they're the only pair, so they're no salvation."

languages.text: "Çoban, kadim bir yaratıktır. Belki birden fazla olabilir. Arada bir o lanet şey ortaya çıkıyor ve çığlık atmaya başlıyor, bizi çıldırtıyor. Neden yaptığını bilmiyoruz. Bildiğimiz, herkesi yavaş yavaş delirttiği. Bazıları paniğe kapılıyor, bazıları öfkeleniyor... Herkeste farklı etki yapıyor. Dunawski'nin kulak koruyucusu var ama başka kimsede olmadığından o da çözüm değil."
languages.original_text: "The Drover is an ancient creature. Maybe there's more than one. Every once in a while, the damn thing comes out and starts shrieking, making us deranged. Who knows why it does it, but what we do know is that it's slowly driving everyone mad. Some people panic, some people get angry... it's different for everyone. Dunawski has ear protection, but they're the only pair, so they're no salvation."

Bildiğimiz, herkesi yavaş yavaş delirttiği. Bazıları paniğe kapılıyor, bazıları öfkeleniyor... Herkeste farklı etki yapıyor. Dunawski'nin kulak koruyucusu var ama başka kimsede olmadığından o da çözüm değil."

languages.text: “拒生花是种古老生物，可能不止一只。每隔一段时间，这天杀的怪物就会冒出来尖啸，让我们神智错乱。我们不知道它这样做的原因，但有一点很清楚：它正在逐步侵蚀所有人的心智。有人恐慌，有人暴怒……具体影响因人而异。杜纳芙斯卡有护耳罩，但只有一副，救不了所有人。”
languages.original_text: "The Drover is an ancient creature. Maybe there's more than one. Every once in a while, the damn thing comes out and starts shrieking, making us deranged. Who knows why it does it, but what we do know is that it's slowly driving everyone mad. Some people panic, some people get angry... it's different for everyone. Dunawski has ear protection, but they're the only pair, so they're no salvation."

traits.locale_text: “拒生花是种古老生物，可能不止一只。每隔一段时间，这天杀的怪物就会冒出来尖啸，让我们神智错乱。我们不知道它这样做的原因，但有一点很清楚：它正在逐步侵蚀所有人的心智。有人恐慌，有人暴怒……具体影响因人而异。杜纳芙斯卡有护耳罩，但只有一副，救不了所有人。”

languages.text: "Der Treiber ist eine uralte Kreatur. Vielleicht gibt es auch mehrere. Ab und an kommt das verdammte Ding raus und raubt uns mit seinem Gekreische den Verstand. Keine Ahnung, warum er das macht, aber wir wissen, dass es alle langsam in den Wahnsinn treibt. Einige Leute geraten in Panik, andere werden wütend ... es ist für jeden anders. Dunawski hat einen Gehörschutz, den einzigen übrigens, das hilft uns also nicht weiter."
languages.original_text: "The Drover is an ancient creature. Maybe there's more than one. Every once in a while, the damn thing comes out and starts shrieking, making us deranged. Who knows why it does it, but what we do know is that it's slowly driving everyone mad. Some people panic, some people get angry... it's different for everyone. Dunawski has ear protection, but they're the only pair, so they're no salvation."

Dunawski hat einen Gehörschutz, den einzigen übrigens, das hilft uns also nicht weiter."

languages.text: « Il s'agit d'une créature particulièrement ancienne. Il est même possible qu'il y en ait plusieurs. Cette maudite bête se manifeste de temps à autre, et son hurlement manque de nous rendre fous. Nul ne sait pourquoi elle fait ça, mais ce qui est sûr, c'est qu'elle nous fait lentement perdre la raison. Certains paniquent, d'autres deviennent tout bonnement furieux... C'est différent pour chacun. Dunawski a bien des bouchons d'oreille, mais c'est la seule paire disponible, donc ils ne servent pas à grand-chose. »
languages.original_text: "The Drover is an ancient creature. Maybe there's more than one. Every once in a while, the damn thing comes out and starts shrieking, making us deranged. Who knows why it does it, but what we do know is that it's slowly driving everyone mad. Some people panic, some people get angry... it's different for everyone. Dunawski has ear protection, but they're the only pair, so they're no salvation."

C'est différent pour chacun. Dunawski a bien des bouchons d'oreille, mais c'est la seule paire disponible, donc ils ne servent pas à grand-chose. »

languages.text: «El Pastor es un ser antiguo. O tal vez varios. De vez en cuando, esa maldita cosa aparece y empieza a gritar, haciendo que perdamos la razón. Nadie sabe por qué lo hace, solo que nos está haciendo enloquecer lentamente. Algunos entran en pánico, otros en cólera... Es distinto para cada uno. Dunawski tiene protección en las orejas, pero es el único par así que no son un remedio».
languages.original_text: "The Drover is an ancient creature. Maybe there's more than one. Every once in a while, the damn thing comes out and starts shrieking, making us deranged. Who knows why it does it, but what we do know is that it's slowly driving everyone mad. Some people panic, some people get angry... it's different for everyone. Dunawski has ear protection, but they're the only pair, so they're no salvation."
